violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Water was added to sanitizer bay to correct concentration. Service call placed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The receiving door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
Door to the walk-in cooler does not close properly. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
Leak observed at the 2-bay sink. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
